profile.name: LivePortrait

intro.title: LivePortrait: Efficient Portrait Animation with Stitching and Retargeting Control
intro.desc: `2025/06/01`**: 🌍 Over the past year, **LivePortrait** has 🚀 become an efficient portrait-animation (humans, cats and dogs) solution adopted by major video platforms—Kuaishou, Douyin, Jianying, WeChat Channels—as well as numerous startups and creators. 🎉 `2025/01/01`**: 🐶 We updated a new version of the Animals model with more data, see [**here**](./assets/docs/changelog/2025-01-01.md). `2024/10/18`**: ❗ We have upda.

install_hints: pip install torch==2.3.0 torchvision==0.18.0 torchaudio==2.3.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118
